title: 仮想カーレースの結果は……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky invites me to join her at the arcade.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for coming with me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for coming with me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm really in the mood for a drive today, but
unfortunately my beloved Tata is getting
maintenance done.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Games nowadays are super realistic though,
aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty good at racing games, I'll have you
know! When I was a kid, I played them all the
time with my mom!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So today, I wanna use my driving skills to burn
rubber in a virtual car!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky looks so excited as she says this, but
shortly afterwards...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Agh, I'm sliding all over the road... No, not like
that, like thi—eeek!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, car! Do what I tell you to! Oh no, there's a
wall! There's a wa—aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I-I can't do it... It's so realistic, it's making me
dizzy... This is nothing like the racing games I
know!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I should have known nothing can replace Tata...
Oh, Tata, please come home soon!
